concepts.name: Model Registry
concepts.description: A centralized catalog tracking ML artifacts, lineages, and explicit execution dependencies across a multi-model portfolio.

concepts.name: Dependency-Aware Deployment
concepts.description: Coordinating model releases by ensuring upstream updates do not break downstream consumer models.

concepts.name: Shadow Deployment
concepts.description: Running a candidate model in parallel with production traffic to safely analyze performance without user impact.

concepts.name: Canary Deployment
concepts.description: Gradually routing an increasing percentage of live traffic to a new model while monitoring for statistical regressions.

concepts.name: Blue-Green Deployment
concepts.description: Instantaneously switching traffic between two identical production environments to isolate risk and enable fast rollbacks.

concepts.name: Multi-Region Deployment
concepts.description: Synchronizing model versions, traffic routing, and rollback protocols across geographically distributed inference infrastructure.

concepts.name: Sticky Routing
concepts.description: Using consistent hashing to guarantee a user's requests route to the exact same model version during distributed deployment transitions.

concepts.name: Telemetry Aggregation
concepts.description: Categorizing and sampling logging data at the edge to prevent monitoring network bottlenecks at high throughput.

concepts.name: Interleaving Experiments
concepts.description: Evaluating model variants by simultaneously presenting a combined ranked list of predictions to a single user.

concepts.name: SUTVA Violations
concepts.description: The failure of A/B testing independence assumptions caused when networked users influence control group outcomes.

concepts.name: Graph Cluster Randomization
concepts.description: Mitigating network effect bias by assigning experimental treatments to dense user communities instead of individuals.

concepts.name: Ego-Exclusion Design
concepts.description: Filtering out control group users with high treatment network exposure to recover unbiased causal effect estimates.

concepts.name: Multiple Testing Correction
concepts.description: Applying statistical adjustments like False Discovery Rate control to prevent false positive deployments across concurrent experiments.

concepts.name: Declarative Deployment API
concepts.description: Abstracting container orchestration, resource allocation, and traffic mesh configurations into a unified deployment specification.

concepts.name: Serving Autoscaling
concepts.description: Dynamically scaling horizontal inference capacity to handle fluctuating traffic demands without violating latency objectives.
